title: Avoid command injection from user input
description: Constructing system command arguments from user input can lead to command injection vulnerabilities. Attackers may exploit this to execute arbitrary commands, compromise data, or take control of the system. Always validate and sanitize user input before using it in system commands.
recommendation: Never use untrusted user input to build system command arguments. Use safe APIs and input validation to prevent injection.

noncompliant:
String userInput = request.getParameter("cmd");
Runtime.getRuntime().exec("sh -c " + userInput); // Noncompliant: user input is used directly
compliant:
String safeInput = sanitize(request.getParameter("cmd"));
Runtime.getRuntime().exec(new String[]{"sh", "-c", safeInput}); // Compliant: input is sanitized

checks.message: Avoid command injection from user input. Do not use untrusted input in system commands.
